Previous page Effective within 3 to 6 days Ant activity outside the nest will normally stop within 3-6 days, and nest eliminated in 1-3 weeks. Each bait station lasts for up to 3 months The bait station is effective and long-lasting, destroying ants and their nests around your home. Ready to use Each bait station is ready to use and is normally sufficient to eliminate one nest. Next page 1 Quick & Effective 2 Lasts Up To 3 Months 3 Ready To Use Destroys ants and their nests AntClear Ant Control Bait Station destroys ants and their nests by luring ants into the bait station to collect the gel bait. Thinking that the gel bait is food they take it back to their nest to feed other ants and the queen, eliminating the entire colony within one to three weeks. Derived from spinosad and chrysanthemum flower extract, the product is certified for use in organic systems and is safe to use around the house вАУ indoor and out вАУ as long as it is weather protected. Why should I use AntClear Ant Control Bait Station? The product contains a ready-to-use gel bait that kills black garden ants and their nests. It can be used indoors and outdoors with results visible within days. The active ingredients are derived from soil bacterium and chrysanthemum extract. Where can I use AntClear Ant Control Bait Station? Not near foodstuffs. The bait station can be used inside or outside (but under cover). Place bait station in or near ant runs when infestation occurs. Keep out of reach of children and pets. When should I use AntClear Ant Control Bait Station? Can be used all year round, when ant infestations are occurring. A maximum of 2 bait stations should be in use at any one time. How do I use AntClear Ant Control Bait Station? Place bait station in or near ant runs. Break off each of the 4 spurs to expose the holes to attract ants to the bait. Ants pick up the bait gel, take it to the nest to feed other ants and the queen, eliminating the entire colony within 1-3 weeks.
